name: obsidian
description: Turn any folder into an AI-powered second brain with persistent memory, task management, meeting intelligence, daily routines, and output styles. Includes /bp-setup, /bp-digest (one-command Raw/ inbox processor), /bp-optimizer (22-pass audit), /bp-evolver (self-evolving knowledge graph: enrich, graph, draft, re-graph; all LLM work via Claude Code subscription, no API key), /bp-operator, /vault-mcp, /team-os, and /assistant. Solo or Business/Teams modes.
